dataList.name: Nightmare of Хохлоленд
dataList.desc:
If there are Хохлоленд Bloodfiends among the enemies, gain the following effects:
- In a Clash against Хохлоленд Bloodfiends, lose 4 Clash Power
- When attacking Хохлоленд Bloodfiends, lose 5 IQ (once per Skill; 2 times per turn)
- Deal -20% Skill damage against Хохлоленд Bloodfiends

dataList.name: Stored Blood
dataList.desc:
At Turn End, depending on the [KeptBlood] Stack on self:
- Наносит +2 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчуп</noparse></link></u></color> and +1 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчуп</noparse></link></u></color> Count on self за каждые Stack
- At 5 or fewer Stack: gain 1 [Binding], 1 [Vulnerable], 1 [AttackDown] and lose 5 IQ на следующий ход за каждые (6 - Stack) (this effect cannot reduce this unit's IQ below -20)
- At more than 5 Stack: gain 1 [AttackUp], 1 [DefenseUp], and хилит 8 IQ на следующий ход за каждые (Stack - 5) (this effect cannot increase this unit's IQ higher than 30)

dataList.name: Sanguivore - Coagulation
dataList.desc:
Upon entry, хилит 30 IQ
Начало хода: Если у этого юнита есть <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчуп</noparse></link></u></color>,
- Gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [DefenseUp] за каждые 5 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчуп</noparse></link></u></color> (макс. 5)
- Gain 1 [ParryingResultUp] за каждые 10 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчуп</noparse></link></u></color> (макс. 2)
Take -50% <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчуп</noparse></link></u></color> damage (rounded down)

dataList.name: Prosthesis Model - L37
dataList.desc:
Upon entry, хилит 20 IQ
Начало хода: за каждые 1 <sprite name="Charge"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Charge"><noparse>Соль</noparse></link></u></color> Count, хилит 1 IQ (макс. 15)
Начало хода: At less than 5 <sprite name="Charge"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Charge"><noparse>Соль</noparse></link></u></color> Count, наносит 1 [Reduction] on self
Начало хода: At 5+ <sprite name="Charge"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Charge"><noparse>Соль</noparse></link></u></color> Count, gain 2 [ParryingResultUp]
Начало хода: At 10+ <sprite name="Charge"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Charge"><noparse>Соль</noparse></link></u></color> Count, gain 1 [PlusCoinValueUp]
Начало хода: At 15+ <sprite name="Charge"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Charge"><noparse>Соль</noparse></link></u></color> Count, deal +(<sprite name="Charge"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Charge"><noparse>Соль</noparse></link></u></color> Count on self x 2)% damage with Base Attack Skills
